title: cerastium vagans subsp. azoricum
intro: Cerastium vagans subsp. azoricum is a plant species also known as Azores mouse-ear, which belongs to the family Caryophyllaceae. It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate various health issues such as digestive problems and skin irritations. The health benefits of Cerastium vagans subsp. azoricum include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is necessary to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
